headline: Dewan Rakyat debates last 45 minutes per bill on average
context: Analysis of 2025 Hansard records showed Dewan Rakyat spent an average of 45 minutes debating each bill, with some legislation passed in under 15 minutes.

cards.big: MPs average 45 minutes debating each new law — some pass in under 15 minutes
cards.sub: Legislation affecting 33 million people gets less scrutiny than a lunch meeting

cards.big: Standing Order 49 allows minister to cut debate short through closure motion
cards.sub: Government can end discussion on any bill with simple majority vote

cards.big: Finance Bill 2025 with RM400 billion implications debated for only 3 hours total
cards.sub: RM133 billion per hour of legislative scrutiny for the nation's entire budget

cards.big: UK House of Commons averages 12 hours of debate per government bill
cards.sub: Malaysian bills receive 16 times less scrutiny than UK parliamentary equivalents

cards.big: Speed-running legislation isn't efficiency — it's the executive governing through a compliant legislature
Should minimum debate periods be set for bills based on fiscal and rights impact?
